meta.description: Mercenary specialization (Hired Gun career). 30 talent cards: 10 Tier 1, 8 Tier 2, 6 Tier 3, 4 Tier 4, 2 Tier 5. Players draft 15 into a pyramid (5/4/3/2/1).

specialization.name: Mercenary
specialization.description: A professional soldier-for-hire. The Mercenary excels at sustained firefights, weapon versatility, and raw combat endurance.

talents.name: Toughened
talents.description: Increase Wound Threshold by 2 per rank.

talents.name: Grit
talents.description: Increase Strain Threshold by 1 per rank.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.description: Once per encounter per rank, recover 2 strain as an incidental.

talents.name: Quick Draw
talents.description: Draw or holster a weapon as an incidental instead of a maneuver.

talents.name: Brace
talents.description: As a maneuver, remove 1 setback die (per rank) from next Ranged (Heavy) or Gunnery check.

talents.name: Point Blank
talents.description: Add 1 damage per rank to ranged attacks at Short range or closer.

talents.name: Durable
talents.description: Subtract 10 per rank from critical injury rolls against you (minimum 11).

talents.name: Spare Clip
talents.description: Weapons with Limited Ammo gain +1 use per encounter.

talents.name: Heroic Fortitude
talents.description: May spend 1 Destiny Point to ignore effects of Critical Injuries on checks until end of encounter.

talents.name: Conditioning
talents.description: Remove 1 setback die from Athletics and Coordination checks. Reduce damage from falling by 1 per rank of Coordination.

talents.name: Barrage
talents.description: Add 1 damage per rank to one hit of a Ranged (Heavy) or Gunnery attack at Long range or farther.

talents.name: Lethal Blows
talents.description: Add +10 per rank to critical injury rolls inflicted on opponents.

talents.name: Enduring
talents.description: Gain +1 Soak per rank.

talents.name: Side Step
talents.description: As a maneuver, upgrade the difficulty of ranged attacks targeting you by 1 per rank until the start of your next turn.

talents.name: Jury Rigged
talents.description: Choose one weapon or armor. Permanently reduce a quality's Advantage cost by 1 (min 1) or increase Limited Ammo by 1.

talents.name: Rain of Fire
talents.description: Perform a ranged attack against all targets within Short range of a point within weapon range. Each target is hit separately.

talents.name: Suppressing Fire
talents.description: Make a Ranged (Heavy) check. Instead of dealing damage, all targets in a Short range zone must make a Discipline check or suffer the Suppressed condition.

talents.name: Bought Time
talents.description: Suffer 2 strain to perform an additional maneuver on your turn (total 3 maneuvers maximum including strain-for-maneuver).

talents.name: Armor Master
talents.description: When wearing armor, increase total Soak by 1.

talents.name: True Aim
talents.description: As a maneuver, upgrade attack pool by 1 per rank for next combat check this turn.

talents.name: Heroic Resilience
talents.description: Once per session, when you would be incapacitated by wounds, immediately heal 5 wounds and continue acting.

talents.name: Crippling Blow
talents.description: Increase Critical rating of next attack by 1 difficulty, but add +20 to the Critical Injury result.

talents.name: Feral Strength
talents.description: Add 1 damage per rank to one hit of Brawl or Melee attacks.

talents.name: Last One Standing
talents.description: Add 1 Proficiency die (yellow) to all combat checks for each ally who has been incapacitated this encounter.

talents.name: Armor Master (Improved)
talents.description: When wearing armor with defense rating 1+, increase defense pool upgrades by 1.

talents.name: Deadly Accuracy
talents.description: Choose one combat skill when purchased. Add ranks in that skill as bonus damage to one hit per round.

mechanicalEffect.description: Player selects combat skill at purchase

talents.name: Unstoppable
talents.description: Suffer 3 strain to perform a second Action this turn (once per encounter).

talents.name: Iron Body
talents.description: Reduce all strain suffered (from any source) by 1, to a minimum of 1.

talents.name: Dedication (Brawn)
talents.description: Permanently increase Brawn by 1.

talents.name: Dedication (Agility)
talents.description: Permanently increase Agility by 1.
